objective: Integrate cTrader cBot and MT5 EA/DLL license enforcement into Hedge Edge UI/flows while preserving existing connection logic
requirements: Installation Manager modal for deploying EA/DLL/cBot assets
License key capture and status display
Permissions checklist for MT4/5 (algo trading, DLL imports, WebRequest)
IPC plumbing for installer and license validation

files_created.purpose: Multi-step wizard for installing EA/DLL/cBot assets to trading terminals
Display required MT4/5 permissions with expandable instructions
License key input, activation, and status display
features: License key input with masked display
Expiration date display with days remaining

files_created.purpose: React hook for license state management

changes: Added LicenseInfo interface (key, status, expiresAt, accountId, etc.)
Added PermissionCheckItem interface (id, label, status, instructions)
Extended ConnectionSession with licenseStatus and licenseError fields
Added getAssetPaths() for EA/DLL/cBot file locations
Added IPC handlers: license:getStatus, license:activate, license:refresh, license:remove
Added IPC handlers: installer:precheck, installer:installAsset, installer:openDataFolder, installer:getAssets
Added licenseAPI object with getStatus, activate, refresh, remove, onStatusChange
Added installerAPI object with precheck, installAsset, openDataFolder, getAssets
Updated electronAPI to include both new APIs
Added imports for Key, AlertTriangle icons and LicenseStatus type
Added license status banner showing expired/invalid/valid states
Display days remaining for valid licenses
Added imports for Key, AlertTriangle icons
Added useLicenseStatus hook import and usage
Added License Management section at top
Added EA & cBot Installation section with modal trigger
Added License Expiry Reminder notification toggle
Replaced inline cTrader instructions with CTraderGuidance component
Added PermissionsChecklist to MT4/MT5 terminal selection step

state_management.license: useLicenseStatus hook with polling, stored in Electron main process

ui_surfaces.settings: Full license management + installation manager access

manual_testing: Open Settings page - verify License Management section appears
Click 'Open Installation Manager' - verify modal opens
In Add Account wizard, select MT4/MT5 terminal - verify permissions checklist appears
In Add Account wizard, select cTrader - verify cBot guidance appears
Check account cards for license status banner
simulated_behavior: License validation is currently simulated (returns valid for keys starting with 'HE-')
File installation checks for asset existence but actual copy is stubbed

future_work: Implement real license validation API integration
Add actual file copy logic for EA/DLL/cBot installation
Add license key persistence in secure storage
Add installation verification (check EA loaded in terminal)

task_list.title: Update Settings page with license section
